testCases.title: View Cart - Display Items
testCases.notes: Navigated to /cart, 3 distinct items displayed with images, names, unit prices, quantities, line totals all formatted to 2 decimal places. URL = /cart after navigation. Consistent with attempt 1.

testCases.notes: Attempt 1 validated; not re-executed. Consistent behavior confirmed via direct-input testing in attempt 3.

testCases.title: Update Quantity - Decrease
testCases.notes: Attempt 1 validated; not re-executed. Decrease button disabled at qty=1 on cart page confirmed consistently (snapshot e242 disabled attribute, Bestoss line).

testCases.title: Update Quantity - Direct Input
testCases.notes: Re-verified: typed '2' into first cart spinbutton via fill, Tab committed. Qty updated to 2, subtotal recalculated to $817.49 = $99.99 + $160.54 ($80.27×2) + $556.95. Line total and subtotal recalculated correctly. changeCartItemQuantity mutation HTTP 200.

testCases.title: Remove Item - Single Product
testCases.notes: Attempt 1 validated; not re-executed. Remove from cart X button behavior stable.

testCases.title: Remove Item - Last Item
testCases.notes: Attempt 1 validated; not re-executed.

testCases.title: Clear Cart - All Items
testCases.notes: Attempt 1 validated; not re-executed. Confirmation dialog pattern confirmed in attempt 1.

testCases.title: Cart Calculations - Subtotal
testCases.notes: Structural math verified: $99.99 (Bestoss×1) + $160.54 (Kingston 512Gb×2 @$80.27) + $556.95 (Kingston 1Tb×5 @$111.39) = $817.48. Sidebar subtotal reads $817.49 (penny discrepancy matches prior attempt 1 observation — consistent). All values 2 decimal places. Updates immediately after qty change.

testCases.title: Cart Calculations - Tax
testCases.notes: Tax line visible in Order Summary: $163.50 ≈ 20% of subtotal $817.49 (off by $0.01 rounding, consistent with Central African Republic tax rate pattern from attempt 1). Total = $817.49 − $0.01 discount + $163.50 tax + $0 shipping = $980.98. Math correct.

testCases.title: Cart Calculations - Shipping
testCases.notes: Shipping cost line visible, defaulted to $0.00 (no delivery method selected). Placeholder 'Select a delivery method' shown in Delivery method dropdown. Behavior consistent with attempt 1; shipping cost updates on method selection previously validated (Fixed Rate Ground = $150).

testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - PDP Increment Adds to Cart Immediately
testCases.notes: Re-verified on Bestoss PDP: qty=0, Decrease disabled; clicked Increase → qty=1, 'in Cart' indicator visible, Decrease enabled, cart badge 7→8. addItem mutation HTTP 200. Stepper IS the add-to-cart pattern (no separate Add to Cart button).

testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - Cart Page Minimum is 1
testCases.notes: Re-verified: Bestoss line qty=1 shows Decrease button disabled (snapshot ref e242 disabled=true). Stepper cannot go below 1 on cart page — user must click Remove from cart X to delete.

testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - Direct Input Updates Cart and Totals
testCases.notes: Re-verified during cart state management: typed '2' via fill() into cart spinbutton, Tab committed, qty updated, line total and subtotal recalculated. No duplicate line item created. changeCartItemQuantity mutation 200.

testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - Invalid Input Rejected
testCases.notes: BUG REPRODUCED (attempt 3). Negative input (-1): typed '-1' into cart spinbutton via fill(), Tab committed. Spinbutton displays '-1' (aria-valuenow='-1'), persists after page refresh (F5 via re-navigation). Cart badge shows '4' = 5 (Kingston 1Tb) + (-1) (Kingston 512Gb) — arithmetically includes negative value. Subtotal $637.22 = $80.27 (server capped at qty=1) + $556.95 = correct server-side value, but UI still displays -1. New observation: 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' warning banner appears in Order Summary (not observed in attempt 1). Place order disabled. Decimal input (1.5): spinbutton displays '1.5' (aria-valuenow='1.5'); GraphQL returns 400 Bad Request (backend correctly rejects), but frontend display stays at '1.5' (validation gap). Attempt 1 reported decimal becomes '15' — attempt 3 observes decimal stays as '1.5' (behavior is different between runs — inconsistent handling). Non-numeric 'abc': blocked at HTML input type=number layer (Playwright fill() throws 'Cannot type text into input[type=number]') — correctly rejected. BL-CART-001 violation confirmed. Bug VCST bug candidate remains open.
testCases.failedAssertion: Negative qty (-1) accepted and displayed; value persists after refresh; decimal 1.5 displayed without rounding or validation message

All $ symbols disappeared from main content, replaced with € on all price elements (unit prices, line totals, subtotal, tax, shipping, total, Recently Browsed). Cart re-queried via getCart in EUR context. Kingston SSDs show €0.00 (no EUR price list entry); Bestoss also €0.00. Currency change goes through server-side price list lookup (not FX conversion). No JS errors.

testCases.title: Currency Switch - Subtotal Shipping Tax All in New Currency
testCases.notes: After USD → EUR switch: Subtotal €0.00, Tax €0.00, Shipping cost €0.00, Total €0.00. All use € (no mixed currency). Math consistent. After EUR → USD restored: subtotal back to $817.48, total $980.98. No mixed currencies at any point.

testCases.title: Select Subset of Cart Items - Totals Reflect Only Selected Items
testCases.notes: REWRITTEN CSV (2026-04-21) — now executes cleanly. Seeded 3 distinct SKUs: Bestoss $99.99×1, Kingston 512Gb $80.27×2, Kingston 1Tb $111.39×5. All 3 checkboxes checked by default. Subtotal (initial) $817.49 / $817.48. Unchecked Bestoss line item checkbox → Subtotal dropped to $717.49 (decrease of ~$100 ≈ Bestoss line total $99.99). Total: $860.99. Bestoss row STILL VISIBLE in cart (not removed). Cart badge UNCHANGED at 8 (item still in cart, just deselected). Vendor-header checkbox auto-updated to unchecked (reflects mixed state). Re-checked Bestoss → Subtotal restored to $817.49, Total back to $980.98. Cart badge still 8 throughout. No JS errors, all GraphQL 200. BL-CART-003-adjacent structural invariants hold. Rewrite resolved the prior BLOCKED verdict.

bugs.title: Cart spinbutton accepts negative and decimal quantities; invalid values persist after page refresh
bugs.description: On /cart page, the line-item quantity spinbutton accepts invalid inputs at the UI layer: (1) Negative values (e.g., -1) are accepted and displayed, with cart badge reflecting the negative contribution arithmetically (badge='4' for 5 + (-1)). Server caps qty at 1 for pricing (subtotal correct) but UI does not revert. Value PERSISTS through page refresh (F5). (2) Decimal values (e.g., 1.5) accepted at UI layer; server returns GraphQL 400 Bad Request but frontend display remains '1.5' without rollback or error indicator on the field. Place Order is disabled with a generic 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' banner, but no specific validation message points to the invalid quantity. (3) Non-numeric strings like 'abc' are correctly blocked at the HTML input type=number layer. Violates BL-CART-001 (cart qty must be positive integer). BUG REPRODUCES in attempt 3 (same as attempt 1). Impact: user confusion; potential cart-state inconsistency between UI and server. Fix needed: client-side validator to reject qty < 1 or non-integer values BEFORE calling mutation; on server 400, revert UI to last valid value and show inline error.
bugs.steps: 1. Log in to storefront. 2. Add a product to cart (qty=1). 3. Navigate to /cart. 4. Click qty spinbutton, clear and type '-1', press Tab. Observe: spinbutton shows '-1', cart badge reflects negative arithmetically. 5. F5 refresh — negative value persists. 6. Click spinbutton, clear and type '1.5', press Tab. Observe: spinbutton shows '1.5', GraphQL 400 in Network tab, but UI does not revert.
bugs.expected: Negative and decimal values rejected at client layer OR server-rejection revert UI to last valid qty with inline validation message.
bugs.actual: Invalid values accepted in UI, persist across refresh; only generic 'Something went wrong' banner shown (not tied to the specific field).

newObservations: Attempt 3 observed 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' banner in Order Summary AFTER submitting invalid qty values — this banner was NOT mentioned in attempt 1. Behavior may be new or was missed in attempt 1. The banner is generic and not attached to the specific invalid field.

Attempt 3: decimal input '1.5' is accepted and displayed as '1.5' (not rounded). Attempt 1 reported decimal became '15' (period stripped and digits concatenated). The discrepancy suggests either behavior changed between runs, or attempt 1 observation was slightly incorrect. Current behavior: decimal rendered as-is in spinbutton, server returns GraphQL 400.

Ctrl+A keyboard selection via browser_press_key does NOT select text in input[type=number] (browser-level limitation). Use Playwright fill() (which calls .value=x and dispatches input event) or triple-click as real-user alternatives. Ctrl+A attempted once concatenated '-1' to existing '10' producing '101' — this is a legitimate real-user-interaction edge case worth documenting.
Build version confirmed unchanged since attempt 1: 2.47.0-pr-2225-130f-130fb04d.
Session authentication inherited from previous test run (John Mitchell, B2B org AGENT-TEST-Org-TechFlow-20260310). Consistent with attempt 1 user context.

CART-037/052/053/054/055: BLOCKED on SEED requirements documented in CSV Automation_Status (2026-04-21 SEED verdicts). Not regressions. Would require: (a) low-stock SKU admin seed, (b) multi-org user admin seed, (c) pack-size SKU admin seed. Recommend running /qa-seed-data to unblock these in a follow-up run.
